Class: Icon

bemap.Icon(options)

Base class for icon.

Constructor

new Icon(options)

Parameters:
Name Type Description
options object See below the available values.
Properties
Name Type Description
src String Source of the image. It can be an URL or an folder path.
anchorX double .
anchorY double .
anchorXUnits String Units of the anchorX.
anchorYUnits String Units of the anchorY.
opacity float a number between 0 and 1 to define the opacity of the icon. 1 to full opacity and 0 to full transparency.
Source:
  • bemap-model/bemap-icon.js, line 18
